authorityBoundary: This snapshot records one local VeritySpec validation run against a candidate generated workspace fixture. It does not certify readiness, production suitability, legal compliance, privacy posture, accessibility posture, or human approval.
unresolvedDecisions: Permission and privacy policy records remain unresolved.
Accessibility, operations, support, maintenance, and archive decisions remain unresolved.
Readiness, lint, graph, and diff checks are not captured by this validation-only snapshot.
reviewerNotes: Re-run the command after fixture content changes and update file hashes in the same change.
Use VeritySpec as the final authority for product-contract validation.
